title: Bridge Essay: Wearable EEG Neurofeedback Based-on Machine Learning Algorithms for Children wit

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Social Incarnation — intersubjectivity, embodied empathy, social predictive processing, second-person neuroscience.

**Wearable EEG Neurofeedback Based-on Machine Learning Algorithms for Children with Autism: A Randomized, Placebo-controlled Study.** — Curr Med Sci. PMID: 39565505. DOI: 10.1007/s11596-024-2938-3. Behavioral interventions have been shown to ameliorate the electroencephalogram (EEG) dynamics underlying the behavioral symptoms of autism spectrum disorder (ASD), while studies have also demonstrated that mirror neuron mu rhythm-based EEG neurofeedback training improves the behavioral functioning of individuals with ASD. This study aimed to test the effects of awearable mu rhythm neurofeedback training system based on machine learning algorithms for children with autism. Arandomized, placebo...
